# Acadify

> Acadify is a modern, affordable school management platform built for schools of every size. It digitalises academic operations — from student and teacher management to attendance, timetables, calendars, and notifications — all in one unified system.

## What is Acadify?

Acadify is a SaaS (Software as a Service) school management platform designed for Indian schools. It replaces scattered spreadsheets, paper registers, and disconnected tools with a single platform that serves everyone in the school — super admins, school admins, teachers, and students.

The platform is built on a role-based access model. Each role gets a tailored dashboard and access to only what is relevant to them.

## Who is Acadify for?

- **School Owners / Management Trusts** — Oversee multiple schools, manage subscriptions and admins
- **School Admins** — Manage students, teachers, attendance, timetables, class teachers, and school calendar
- **Teachers** — Mark student attendance, view their own timetable and attendance, manage their class
- **Students** — View personal attendance, timetable, class teacher info, school calendar, and notifications

## Core Features (Available in v1)

### Student Management
- Add students individually or bulk import via CSV
- Student profiles with personal details, guardian info, blood group, Aadhaar, address, profile picture
- Unique student ID auto-generated per school (format: `{schoolCode}{NNNN}`)
- Temporary passwords issued on import; students reset on first login

### Teacher Management
- Add teachers individually or bulk import via CSV
- Teacher profiles with employee ID, joining date, subject info
- Unique employee ID auto-generated per school (format: `{schoolCode}T{NNN}`)

### Attendance
- Teachers mark daily student attendance (Present / Absent / Late)
- Admins can view and edit attendance for any date
- Students and parents can view personal attendance calendar
- School session start date anchors attendance rate calculations
- Attendance rate = (Present + Late) / total working days × 100
- Teachers can only edit attendance within the current week; admins have no restriction

### Teacher Attendance
- Admins mark and review teacher attendance separately
- Teacher attendance history and monthly overview available

### Timetable
- Admins create period structures and assign subjects/teachers per class per day
- Teachers view their own daily/weekly schedule
- Students view their class timetable

### School Calendar
- Admins mark holidays, working weekends, half days, and school events
- Teachers and students see a read-only calendar
- Holidays block attendance submission for that date

### Notifications
- Admins can send announcements to all students, all teachers, or specific class sections
- Teachers and students receive notifications in their dashboard
- Unread count badge shown in sidebar navigation

### Class Teachers
- Admins assign a class teacher to each class-section
- Teachers can view their assigned class
- Students can see who their class teacher is
- Admins can grant temporary attendance access to substitute teachers

### Profile Management
- All users complete their profile on first login (after password reset)
- Profile includes: date of birth, blood group, Aadhaar number, address, profile picture
- Profile picture uploaded to Cloudinary

### Authentication & Security
- Username + password login (no OAuth)
- Mandatory password reset on first login
- JWT-based sessions (10-day expiry, refreshed every 15 minutes)
- School subscription check on every login and JWT refresh
- Rate limiting on login and password reset endpoints (Upstash Redis)

### Subscription & Multi-tenancy
- Super admins manage schools and their subscription status
- Subscription statuses: TRIAL, ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED
- Schools auto-suspended when trial or subscription expires
- Pricing is per-student-strength, customised per school

### Birthdays
- Admins, teachers, and students can view upcoming birthdays for their school community

## Features Planned for Future Versions (NOT in v1)

- Fee Management
- Result / Report Card Management
- Communication Hub (internal messaging)
- Class Log (daily subject-wise teaching log)
- Parent portal / parent role

## Pricing Model

Acadify does not publish fixed pricing. Pricing is customised based on the number of students in the school. All plans include a free trial. Schools book a call with the Acadify team to get a tailored quote.

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, shadcn/ui
- **Backend**: Next.js API Routes (server-side), Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL
- **Auth**: NextAuth v5 (JWT strategy, Credentials provider)
- **Storage**: Cloudinary (profile pictures)
- **Rate Limiting**: Upstash Redis
- **Deployment**: Vercel

## User Roles

| Role | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `SUPER_ADMIN` | Platform owner; manages all schools, subscriptions, and imports |
| `ADMIN` | School-level admin; manages teachers, students, attendance, timetable, calendar |
| `TEACHER` | Marks class attendance, views own timetable and attendance |
| `STUDENT` | Views personal attendance, timetable, calendar, notifications |

## Onboarding Flow

1. School contacts Acadify → books a demo call
2. Acadify team creates the school on the platform
3. Admin credentials shared with the school admin
4. Admin logs in → resets password → completes profile → accesses dashboard
5. Admin imports teachers and students via CSV
6. Teachers and students log in with temporary credentials → reset password → complete profile
7. School operations begin: attendance, timetable, calendar, notifications

## Brand

- **Brand Name**: Acadify
- **Tagline**: A digital evolution for every school
- **Brand Color**: #1e2a4a (dark navy blue)
- **Target Market**: K-12 schools in India
- **Mission**: Make powerful school management software accessible and affordable for every school, regardless of size
